+    total_episodes = len(per_episode)

+    overall_explored = sum(ep['explored_rate'] for ep in per_episode) / max(1, total_episodes)

+    overall_success = sum(ep['success'] for ep in per_episode) / max(1, total_episodes)

+    overall_distance = 0.0

+    n_success = sum(ep['success'] for ep in per_episode)

+    if n_success > 0:

+        overall_distance = sum(ep['travel_distance'] for ep in per_episode if ep['success']) / n_success

+

+    # per_type averages

+    for t in env_types:

+        n = per_type[t]['n_eps']

+        if n > 0:

+            per_type[t]['explored_rate'] /= n

+            if per_type[t]['success_rate'] > 0:

+                per_type[t]['travel_distance'] /= per_type[t]['success_rate']

+            per_type[t]['success_rate'] /= n

+        else:

+            per_type[t] = {'explored_rate': 0.0, 'travel_distance': 0.0, 'success_rate': 0.0}

+

+    output = {
